ticker.season: Season 2 Registration Open — PS5 & Xbox drivers welcome
ticker.racing: Professional GT3 console racing — clean competition only

hero.subtitle: The Advanced Simracing Pro League is a competitive ACC console league on PlayStation 5 & Xbox Series X|S. Built on clean GT3 racing and long-term driver development — professional motorsport, console-level.

card.heading: VISION & PADDOCK ETHOS
card.p1: The Advanced Simracing Pro League (ASPL) is a competitive Assetto Corsa Competizione console racing league focused on professional league racing, clean competition, long-term driver development, and a strong community atmosphere.
card.p2: Primarily based on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S, ASPL operates in the GT3 class. Our goal is to create one of the most competitive and professional console ACC leagues while remaining welcoming for newer and developing drivers.
card.p3: We want a serious motorsport identity similar to real-world GT racing organisations — clean, premium, and professional. Not a gaming club. A racing league.

gt3.title: GT3 CLASS RACING
gt3.desc: ACC's most competitive class — Ferrari 296 GT3, Mercedes-AMG GT3 Evo, and Aston Martin V8 Vantage AMR GT3. Fixed grid with real Balance of Performance.

dev.title: DRIVER DEVELOPMENT
dev.desc: Team coaches, telemetry sessions, track guides and mentoring. We develop drivers for the long term, not just one season.

clean.title: CLEAN RACING STANDARDS
clean.desc: Incident review process managed through our Discord stewards channel. Onboard footage reviewed, fair penalties enforced — consistent and transparent.

broadcast.title: BROADCAST RACES
broadcast.desc: Live Twitch broadcasts with overlays, commentary, and driver cams. Race highlights uploaded to YouTube. Follow us on TikTok for clips.

team.title: ACC TEAM SERIES
team.desc: The flagship ASPL championship. Teams compete together across the season building constructor standings. Race day is Saturday — Practice at 18:30, Qualifying at 19:00, race start approximately 19:20.

solo.title: ACC SOLO SPRINT SERIES
solo.desc: Pure driver vs driver on a fixed grid of three cars: Ferrari 296 GT3, Mercedes-AMG GT3 Evo, and Aston Martin V8 Vantage AMR GT3. Wednesday nights, open to all registered ASPL drivers.
bullets: Fixed grid: Ferrari 296 GT3 · Mercedes-AMG GT3 Evo · Aston Martin V8 Vantage AMR GT3

endurance.title: ENDURANCE CUP
endurance.desc: The ultimate ASPL test — longer race durations, night driving, dynamic weather, and driver swaps. The Endurance Cup is currently in planning and will be announced as a future special event.

signup.title: WANT TO JOIN THE GRID?
signup.desc: Entry is via a trial race. The only requirements are consistency and racecraft — no fixed lap times, no minimum SR. Join our Discord and we'll get you on track.

card.title: TEAM ENTRY
card.desc: Teams compete in the ACC Team Series, fielding 2–4 drivers per entry. Constructor points are accumulated across the season.

rulebook.heading: RULEBOOK & PENALTIES
rulebook.desc: ASPL operates a clearly defined set of regulations covering incident procedures, penalty guidelines, car eligibility, and sporting conduct. The full rulebook is available to all registered drivers.
rulebook.contact: Questions about a penalty or ruling? Contact the stewards directly via the #stewards channel on Discord.

stats.noDataSub: Statistics will appear once drivers and results have been added.

stream.title: STREAM BROADCAST
stream.click: Click to tune into ASPL Officiated Stream
stream.upcoming: Upcoming Live Cast: ACC Team Series

discord.desc: Join the paddock, find a team

instagram.desc: Behind the scenes & race weekend content

brand.desc: The Advanced Simracing Pro League is a competitive ACC console league built on clean racing, long-term driver development, and a serious motorsport identity — on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S.

join.heading: JOIN THE PADDOCK
join.desc: Entry is via a trial race — consistency and racecraft are all we look for. Join our Discord to get onboarded, find a team, and race on the best ACC console grid around.
